transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
I got really bored, so I thought about doing something different today
I will be doing a mirror mukbang
This was a whopper mukbang
6 big whoppers and 4 other burgers
And also 2 fries if I recall correctly
I have the same thing here
I was a very inexperienced streamer back then Really awkward as well, so bear with me
The video stopped
From Burger King
I look the same
[Explaining the type of burgers]
I'll do the same thing
I don't remember, but
Quatro cheese whopper,
[King Chicken Burger, Quatro Cheese Burger, Whole Chicken Leg Burger, Bulgogi Burger, Bulgogi Whopper, Junior Whopper, Whole Mozarella Whopper, Truffle Mushroom Whopper, Whole Shrimp Whopper, Cheese Bacon Whopper, The Quatro Cheese Whopper]

Bulgogi whopper
So delicious
Smoky flavor
Yes, very smoky
It tastes good
But it's a bit dry
It's not dry at all It's really good
My hands are not that small It's pretty big
Agreed
It pauses by itself
I'm dropping everything here because the burger is so big
This guy is..
Bacon cheese
I have that here
Thank you for the donations
Why's the dog barking?

I can't taste the bacon that much
I can taste a lot of bacon There's a lot of bacon
I guess it changed
I'm so touched by all the donations
This one is a bit smaller
It's the chicken burger
What burger?
Hey, wait for me
You're going so fast
I don't have the New Orleans Chicken Burger
So I'll eat the new burger
The Quatro Cheese
The buns are cheesy It's a new menu
I can taste the cheese from the bread
It's crispy
Thank you for the donations

I can taste the cheese from the buns, but it doesn't make a huge difference
This is just like a chicken breast
This is a loaf of cheese
1 bite
Who said "blowfish vs blowfish"!?
Should I eat the Whole Shrimp Whopper?
Whole Shrimp Whopper?
There's shrimp in here somewhere
Hiding behind the tomatoes
The new burger
It's just too much cheese
It's not a burger It's cheese
That's spicy
This one is spicy
I was not good at eating spicy food back then too
It has a kick

It's shrimp
It's different from a chili pepper sauce
This is a like..
Spicier
My fries and cheese sticks got soggy
Mine's not soggy
Chili pepper sauce
Since I don't like ketchup
There was such a thing?
This is like the sauce from the chips
Looks just like it
What am I eating?
It looks like a small burger I'll take a small burger
Quatro Cheese Whopper
It's a little bigger than a regular burger
The middle part tastes really good

The outer parts are lacking sauce
I better catch up while she's thanking the donations
Thank you for the donations
Thank you
I'll just eat what I want to eat now,
Truffle Mushroom Whopper
It looks different
So delicious
Truffle Mushroom Whopper
The sauce is amazing
I can see that it can get too greasy
But it's still good
Looking too ugly
What to eat next?
I'm not too sure
This one is the Chicken...

Chicken Burger
The buns are very thick
Oh I know why
She still has 2 Whoppers left
This one is too dry
It's very hard to swallow
The buns are too dry
Even if it's a little salty,
Well, I've never had a burger this salty before
She's saying it's salty
I've never had a burger this dry before
Did you see that? Punk
This is Shrimp There's a reason why I saved this
This is cheese, so I'm going to air-fry it
At once
Whole Mozarella

This is so big
It's the biggest Whopper I've ever had
The Whole Shrimp Whopper was decent
Nah it was whatevers
I liked the Truffle Mushroom one the best
I don't know why it's not giving me the cheese pull

I like sweet sauce

I thought about doing a mirror mukbang of a mirror mukbang

I'm happy

This one tastes good
This would be really good if it was heated up
I think I lost
Because I eat that burger in 1 bite
Being young is the best
1 bite

I'll do it as well
1 bite?
I won!
There's too much sauce on my fingers

That's why I had to duck

Like that It's weird

I was just really awkward
Just like that
That expression tho
